subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Maqsud
subcodes.first_line: A praise which is exalted above every mention or description beseemeth the Adored One, the Possessor of all things… Regard man as a mine rich in gems of inestimable value… The Word is the master key for the whole world
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و بیان حضرت معبود و مالک غیب و شهودی را لایق و سزاست که از
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @universal language, @education of children; moral education, @reward and punishment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @unity; oneness of humanity, @consultation, @work as worship
